final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster for a social media cover announcing GPT-image-2 launch on Lovart platform.

Style/medium: editorial magazine cover aesthetic, clean typography-driven layout, high-end fashion magazine sensibility
Composition: diagonal composition with dynamic visual flow, asymmetrical balance, text and graphic elements arranged along diagonal axis
Subject: bold headline featuring platform and model names, modern sans-serif typography hierarchy
Scene/backdrop: minimal abstract gradient or solid color background with subtle texture, generous negative space
Lighting/mood: dramatic high contrast, bold shadows, confident and premium atmosphere
Color palette: high contrast accent color against neutral base, monochrome with single vibrant accent
Text (verbatim): "GPT-image-2", "Lovart"
Constraints: must work as 2:3 vertical cover format; text must remain legible at thumbnail size
Avoid: cluttered layout, multiple competing accent colors, decorative flourishes, generic stock imagery
